---
pagetitle: "About · Simon Hamra"
description: "Business analytics student at Boston University, moving from a marketing background into machine learning and data."
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.page-intro}
::: {.wrap}
<span class="eyebrow">About</span>

# Hi, I am Simon.

::: {.lead}
I am a 23 year old student from France, doing my master in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University. I like taking messy data and turning it into something a person can actually read and use.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}
::: {.bento}

::: {.card .col-4}
## My path is not a straight line

I started with a bachelor in management at Rennes School of Business, then a master in marketing at HULT. For a while I thought my career would be in marketing, and my two internships were in that world. One was in e-commerce in France, the other was in London handling the social media and public image of DJs.

But on almost every project, the part I enjoyed the most was the data. Looking at the numbers, finding a pattern, and explaining what it means in simple words. So I decided to stop doing it on the side and study analytics for real.

At Boston University, my analytics coursework is where I got hands-on with data at scale. In one course I worked through a series of projects on a large Lightcast job posting dataset: using PySpark to handle a file too big for a normal laptop, cleaning it, modeling it in SQL, and building charts and machine learning models on top. Those projects are what you see in this portfolio. On my own time I keep learning machine learning step by step, from simple regression up to neural networks and transformers.

What I want next is a first real experience in machine learning. It is the field I grew to love, and I learn the fastest when I work on a real problem with real data.
:::

::: {.card .col-2}
<span class="eyebrow">In short</span>

::: {.tl}
::: {.tl__item .is-now}
<span class="tl__when">Now · Boston</span>
<div class="tl__what">MS, Applied Business Analytics</div>
<span class="tl__where">Boston University, MET</span>

Coursework on large Lightcast labor data with PySpark and Spark SQL, plus self study in machine learning.
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">Master · marketing</span>
<div class="tl__what">MSc, Marketing</div>
<span class="tl__where">HULT</span>
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">Internship · London</span>
<div class="tl__what">Social media and content</div>
<span class="tl__where">OneEvent</span>

Managed the public image of DJs. Created reels and posts, and grew their reach.
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">Internship · France</span>
<div class="tl__what">E-commerce and marketing</div>
<span class="tl__where">Fereira</span>

SEO and online marketing for an e-commerce shop.
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">Bachelor · management</span>
<div class="tl__what">BSc, Management</div>
<span class="tl__where">Rennes School of Business</span>
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}
::: {.contact-card}
<span class="eyebrow">What I am looking for</span>

### A first role in machine learning or data

I am open to internships and junior roles. If you are hiring and you think I could fit, I would be happy to talk.

::: {.btn-row style="justify-content:center"}
[Download my CV](assets/cv/Simon-Hamra-CV.pdf){.btn .btn--brand}
[See my projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn--ghost}
:::
:::
:::
:::
